title: Blood_medium_r1
treatment_protocol_ch1: Blood was incubated alone, or with 5 x 10 [4] live mycobacteria, which is equivalent to a multiplicity of infection of 1 mycobacterium to 1 monocyte.
growth_protocol_ch1: Human blood from BCG-vaccinated health donors (1ml) incubated for 6 days with/without live mycobacteria in L-glutamine-supplemented RPMI-1640 medium. Supernatant removed and cells lysed in 10ml RNA/DNA Stabilization reagent (Roche Applied Science). Samples from three donors were pooled after RNA extraction.
extract_protocol_ch1: mRNA Isolation Kit for Blood/Bone Marrow (Roche Applied Science) and Turbo DNA-free™ treatment (Ambion: Applied Biosystems)
label_protocol_ch1: A total of 500pg mRNA (166.67 from each donor) was processed using NuGEN Ovation® Whole Blood Solution
hyb_protocol: Fragmented and biotinylated cDNA was hybridised to Human U133 Plus 2.0 Affymetrix GeneChips at 45C, 60 rpm for 18 hours. GeneChips were washed and stained with an Affymetrix GeneChip Fluidics station 450, protocol EukGE-WS2v4_450.
data_processing: GC-RMA summarised using GeneSpring GX11.5.  GC-RMA and baseline normalised to the medium control array provided on the Series record.
contact_institute: London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine
